news.title: ASX 200 Edges Lower at Monday Open as Hormuz Tensions and Weak US Futures Weigh on Sentiment

news.title: Norfolk copper pivot gains bite with 11.8 Mt Chilean JORC resource
news.description: Norfolk Metals has de-risked its transformational Chilean copper purchase by delivering an 11.8Mt resource at 2.88 per cent copper equivalent for the Ciclón project, ahead of an August completion target.
